channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title: 今天去了神保町的局外人书店，讨论下周三在銀座单向街的话题分享。这期是我在单向街今年 AI 系列主题活动分享的第一期！本期介绍如何使用今年以来流行的 OpenClaw，hermes agent 和我做的...
item.author: @turingou

item.title: The takeaway is simple. Your website is no longer a static asset. It can brief an entire marketing e...
item.description:
The takeaway is simple. Your website is no longer a static asset. It can brief an entire marketing engine if you let the right AI read it.
Watch the full video to see my breakdown and try it for yourself.
Don't miss out on the latest AI advancements! Sign up here to stay informed! https://t.co/7CShHlOEp5
--- @Ronald_vanLoon | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 51
item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon

item.title:
The real advantage is scale and consistency.
One message becomes many variations → perfect for A/B ...
item.description:
The real advantage is scale and consistency.
One message becomes many variations → perfect for A/B testing. Every output matches your voice → no more generic AI.
Teams get two big benefits:
→ Small teams gain scale they could never hire for → Larger teams stay perfectly consistent across channels
Available today in the US, Canada, Australia, and New Zealand.
--- @Ronald_vanLoon | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 49
item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon

item.title:
Your website might be the most underused asset in your entire marketing stack.
What if it could bri...
item.description:
Your website might be the most underused asset in your entire marketing stack.
What if it could brief a full marketing team for you, automatically?
Most brands waste hours rewriting the same story in every prompt.
There is a faster way — and @GoogleLabs is shaping what that future looks like.
Here is the breakdown...
--- @Ronald_vanLoon | ❤️ 1 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 74
item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon

item.title:
Thank you Poltava for a wonderful meetup! 🇺🇦
We were very happy to see so many inspired and interes...
item.description:
Thank you Poltava for a wonderful meetup! 🇺🇦
We were very happy to see so many inspired and interesting people! Our meetup was full of energy, learning and positive vibes.
We will remember this meetup for a long time. https://t.co/6diqCLWBBv
--- @binance | ❤️ 104 | 🔁 16 | 💬 46 | 👁 8527
